query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A dimly lit living room scene with a decorated evergreen tree on the left side, a plaid-patterned upholstered chair on the right, and two Santa Claus-themed figures lying on the carpeted floor in the foreground. A folded pink garment rests on the arm of the chair. String lights on the tree appear as bright streaks. The room has floral wallpaper and a wooden floor lamp visible behind the chair.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dimly lit living room scene heavily dominated by an intense orange-yellow color cast and extreme overexposure that washes out most detail. Bright streaks of string lights on an evergreen tree dissolve into chaotic scribbles of light due to motion blur or long exposure. A plaid-patterned upholstered chair sits to the right with a folded pink garment on its arm. Two Santa Claus-themed figures lie on the carpeted foreground, their features melted into the overpowering warm glare. The entire image glows with a suffocating amber haze reminiscent of light leak or film fogging, with floral wallpaper barely visible through the haze. A wooden floor lamp stands behind the chair, half-obscured by the exposure extremes. The casual, off-balance framing and snapshot quality suggest an unplanned, accidental capture.
